events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: personnel working under a suspended load is a critical, fail-condition hazard under OSHA 1926.1425 — immediate action is to stop the lift, clear the fall/swing radius, barricade the exclusion zone, and verify rigging/load chart compliance before resuming.
